steps.title: Use the praise clue
steps.content: The sentence says the book has earned a lot of praise. The phrase In fact signals that the next sentence gives a stronger example of that praise: getting an award.

steps.title: Choose the award verb
steps.content: Choice A means estimated without certainty, which does not fit an award. Choice B is negative and illogical. Choice D would mean the book lost memory of the award. The verb meaning was given naturally completes the sentence. The answer is C.
